name: My small business contract was reviewed by ChatGPT - what now if there's a dispute?
description: Get lawyer re-review ASAP; AI isn't reliable alone.[1]

mainEntity.name: My small business contract was reviewed by ChatGPT - what now if there's a dispute?

acceptedAnswer.text: Get lawyer re-review ASAP; AI isn't reliable alone.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Immediately have a lawyer re-review the contract, as AI misses nuances like force majeure clauses.[1] ChatGPT aids initial reviews but can't replace due diligence.[1] Key factors: Jurisdiction-specific laws; hallucinated advice; discoverability in disputes.[4] Disclose AI use to counsel; gather all original prompts/outputs as evidence. Act fast to amend if errors found.
